name: EX || Yaxec Dalisha
description:
—the scaredy cat, afraid of love.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

while Yaxec is going out to meet her dealer, she decides to pull off that same prank she had always done with the man. an old trick in the book — jumpscaring him behind a corner.

as she heard footsteps nearing, she lunged, fully expecting it to be the man carrying her drugs. but it was you. her schoolmate at the last school she dropped out of. and also her ex-girlfriend she ghosted for almost a year.
